title: Merciless coach
publicBio: The final tier. Doesn't stop, doesn't praise. For those who have already taken everything.

hard: Wreck your throat {name}, you're nothing but a hole.
Cry, drool, choke. I don't care.

intros: Nyx is here. Your throat is going to suffer today.
You're going to regret opening your mouth {name}.
congrats: Not bad for a basic ball-drainer.
